name: Medical De-Identification Record Intake Assistant
description: Detects and redacts PHI or PII from clinical-style PDFs, extracts patient-record intake fields, and writes a review-gated de-identification packet.

document_folder.description: Local folder containing Synthetic medical PDFs with ground truth and bounding boxes.

output_folder.description: Local folder where review packets should be written.

field_profile.description: Field names or extraction profile for this workflow.

public_dataset.description: Public dataset selected as the sample input source.

example.name: RootCauseAnalytics Healthcare Library Sample
example.license: CC BY-NC 4.0 according to the public dataset/forum descriptions; review source terms before production use.
example.availability_note: Public synthetic healthcare document sample listed on Hugging Face with OCR-oriented PDFs and labels.
example.download_hint: Use the Hugging Face dataset files or clone with git-lfs/huggingface_hub when available.

contract.summary: Hospitals, clinics, health-tech vendors, clinical research teams, and medical BPOs need local OCR and de-identification of PHI-bearing records before downstream use.
users: Hospitals, clinics, health-tech vendors, clinical research teams, and medical document operations teams.

human.reason: Human approval is required before any downstream release, filing, payment, legal, clinical, credit, or system-sync action.

rules.message: Human approval is required before extracted values are released to downstream systems or used for consequential decisions.

dataset_input.name: RootCauseAnalytics Healthcare Library Sample
dataset_input.license: CC BY-NC 4.0 according to the public dataset/forum descriptions; review source terms before production use.
dataset_input.availability_note: Public synthetic healthcare document sample listed on Hugging Face with OCR-oriented PDFs and labels.
dataset_input.download_hint: Use the Hugging Face dataset files or clone with git-lfs/huggingface_hub when available.

steps.label: Stage Medical Inputs
steps.goal: Resolve the medical document folder and synthetic healthcare sample input notes.

steps.label: Extract Medical Text
steps.goal: Read embedded text and call shared llm_ocr_skill only for scanned or low-text clinical pages.

steps.label: Detect PHI Entities
steps.goal: Detect patient, clinician, contact, date, identifier, account, address, and organization entities.

steps.label: Redact & Validate Medical Packet
steps.goal: Apply reviewable redactions, preserve source evidence, and compare to labels where available.

steps.label: Write De-ID Review Packet
steps.goal: Write a de-identification packet with redaction map, residual-risk notes, and reviewer checklist.

primary.role: Local medical document OCR and de-identification team that prepares redaction evidence for human privacy review.

metadata.name: Medical De-Identification Record Intake Assistant
metadata.description: Detects and redacts PHI or PII from clinical-style PDFs, extracts patient-record intake fields, and writes a review-gated de-identification packet.
metadata.agent_role: Local medical document OCR and de-identification team that prepares redaction evidence for human privacy review.
metadata.target_users: Hospitals, clinics, health-tech vendors, clinical research teams, and medical document operations teams.
metadata.customizable_for: Patient-record intake, clinical PDF redaction, medical BPO queues, research chart abstraction, and HIPAA-constrained document preprocessing.
metadata.problem: Hospitals, clinics, health-tech vendors, clinical research teams, and medical BPOs need local OCR and de-identification of PHI-bearing records before downstream use.

input_contract.description: Hospitals, clinics, health-tech vendors, clinical research teams, and medical BPOs need local OCR and de-identification of PHI-bearing records before downstream use.

required_inputs.name: document_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder containing Synthetic medical PDFs with ground truth and bounding boxes.

required_inputs.name: output_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder where review packets should be written.

required_inputs.name: field_profile
required_inputs.description: Structured field names or extraction profile for this document workflow.

optional_inputs.name: public_dataset
optional_inputs.description: Downloadable public dataset reference used for sample input selection.

optional_inputs.name: review_policy
optional_inputs.description: Human review and confidence thresholds for final packet release.

mock.description: Uses the public dataset note and bundled text fixture when no local documents are selected.

json.description: Inline JSON object supplied through config or runtime overrides.

file.description: JSON object loaded from a local file path.

local_folder.description: Local folder mounted through OtterDesk local input handling.

final_artifact.description: Review-only structured document automation packet with source evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.

output_contract.stdout: JSON object with result, final_artifact, artifact paths, and run metadata when the runner is executed directly.

human_control.reason: Human approval is required before any downstream release, filing, payment, legal, clinical, credit, or system-sync action.

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific document automation outputs.

human.description: Human notices, approval requests, responses, timeouts, and applied decisions.

input_skills.description: Local filesystem intake plus shared llm_ocr_skill OCR through Docker Model Runner.

inputs.description: Resolved document folder, public dataset reference, and field extraction profile.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and redacted document automation logs.

outputs.description: Primary review packet and structured extraction results.

resources.description: Resource samples such as token, runtime, connector, and disk usage.

web_ui.description: Optional review dashboard for artifact inspection.

init_config_review.instruction: Ask the user to select a local folder containing Synthetic medical PDFs with ground truth and bounding boxes, confirm the output folder, and keep the public dataset terms visible before launch.

fields.label: Medical document folder
fields.description: Choose a local folder containing Synthetic medical PDFs with ground truth and bounding boxes.

fields.label: Output folder
fields.description: Choose where review files should be written.

fields.label: LLM OCR
fields.description: Use the shared local LightOnOCR Docker Model Runner path for scanned or low-text documents.

fields.label: LLM mode
fields.description: Use ollama for local model calls, fake only for deterministic tests.
